title: BEM-1030 receipt scanner
objective:
Create file governance/validators/scan_external_receipt_directories.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

RECEIPT_DIRS = {
    "production_telegram_gate": Path("governance/proofs/external/telegram"),
    "live_llm_runtime_gate": Path("governance/proofs/external/runtime"),
    "external_claude_reaudit": Path("governance/proofs/external/claude"),
}
IGNORED_NAMES = {".gitkeep", "README.md"}
FORBIDDEN_PATTERNS = ["token", "secret", "api_key", "pat", "raw_credentials"]


def scan():
    slots = []
    for gate, directory in RECEIPT_DIRS.items():
        files = []
        if directory.exists():
            for path in sorted(directory.iterdir()):
                if path.name in IGNORED_NAMES:
                    continue
                files.append(str(path))
        status = "receipt_present_pending_validation" if files else "blocked_missing_real_receipt"
        slots.append({"gate": gate, "directory": str(directory), "status": status, "files": files})
    return {"ok": True, "slots": slots, "forbidden_patterns": FORBIDDEN_PATTERNS}


def main():
    out = Path("governance/reports/BEM1030_EXTERNAL_RECEIPT_DIRECTORY_SCAN_RESULT.json")
    out.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    out.write_text(json.dumps(scan(), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
